params.amount: USDC amount (already transferred to this contract)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.description: Human-readable label (e.g. "Gold Standard — Kenya Cookstoves Q3")

authorizedDepositors(address).notice: Authorised callers that can deposit fees (GreenPay, InvoiceManager)

balance().notice: Current USDC balance sitting in the fund

contributionOf(address).notice: Returns a user's total green contribution in USDC (6 dec)

depositFee(address,uint256).notice: Called by GreenPay / InvoiceManager to record a green fee

setDepositor(address,bool).notice: Owner grants/revokes deposit rights to payment contracts

totalContributions().notice: Total USDC deposited into the green fund (all time)

totalWithdrawn().notice: Total USDC withdrawn to carbon projects

userContributions(address).notice: Cumulative USDC (6 decimals) contributed per user address

withdraw(address,uint256,string).notice: Owner withdraws USDC to a certified carbon credit project
